name: OBI-1 with Momentum Confirmation
hypothesis: The predictive power of order book imbalance (OBI) is amplified when it aligns with recent price momentum. This spec combines a strong OBI-1 signal with a check for positive mid-price momentum over the last 50 ticks (5 seconds), filtering for entries where flow and trend are in agreement.
mutation_note: Adding a momentum regime filter (`rolling_momentum > 0`) to a foundational OBI-1 signal to create a new ensemble signal, aiming to improve precision by requiring trend confirmation.
